# acciddasuite

`acciddasuite` provides a simple pipeline for infectious diseases
forecasts. It validates input data
([`check_data()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/check_data.md)),
optionally applies nowcasting to adjust for reporting delays
([`get_ncast()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_ncast.md)),
evaluates models by cross-validation
([`get_cv()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_cv.md)),
and generates forecasts
([`get_fcast()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_fcast.md)).

## Installation

You can install the development version of acciddasuite from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
#pak::pak("ACCIDDA/acciddasuite")
```

## Example

``` r

library(acciddasuite)
head(example_data)
#> # A tibble: 6 × 5
#>   as_of      location target            target_end_date observation
#>   <date>     <chr>    <chr>             <date>                <dbl>
#> 1 2024-11-17 NY       wk inc covid hosp 2020-08-08              517
#> 2 2024-11-24 NY       wk inc covid hosp 2020-08-08              517
#> 3 2024-12-01 NY       wk inc covid hosp 2020-08-08              517
#> 4 2024-12-08 NY       wk inc covid hosp 2020-08-08              517
#> 5 2024-12-15 NY       wk inc covid hosp 2020-08-08              517
#> 6 2024-12-22 NY       wk inc covid hosp 2020-08-08              517
```

``` r

fcast <- example_data |>
  check_data() |>
  get_ncast() |>
  get_cv(eval_start_date = max(example_data$target_end_date) - 28) |>
  get_fcast(top_n = 3)
#> ℹ Using max_delay = 6 from data
#> ℹ Truncating from max_delay = 6 to 2.
#> [2026-06-17 19:07:08.646] get_cv: +0.7772 secs
#> [2026-06-17 19:07:09.427] get_fcast: +2.2583 secs

fcast
#> <accidda_fcast>
#> 
#> Models ranked (cross-validation):
#> # A tibble: 4 × 2
#>   model_id   wis
#>   <chr>    <dbl>
#> 1 THETA     26.3
#> 2 ARIMA     28.6
#> 3 ETS       30.4
#> 4 SNAIVE   256. 
#> 
#> Forecast horizon:
#>   From: 2026-03-21 
#>   To:   2026-04-11 
#> 
#> Contents:
#>   $hub    hub forecast object (model_out_tbl, oracle_output)
#>   $score  model ranking table, or NULL
#>   $meta   models, top_n, h, location, target, interval, nowcast
```

Save to [myRespiLens](https://www.respilens.com/myrespilens) format:

``` r

to_respilens(fcast, path = "respilens.json")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`EPIESTIM()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/EPIESTIM.md)
  : EpiEstim model for fable

- [`check_data()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/check_data.md)
  : Validate surveillance data

- [`default_models()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/default_models.md)
  : Default forecasting models

- [`example_data`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/example_data.md)
  : Weekly COVID-19 hospital admissions for New York

- [`get_cv()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_cv.md)
  : Cross-validate forecasting models

- [`get_data()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_data.md)
  : Fetch hospitalisation data

- [`get_fcast()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_fcast.md)
  : Produce a forward-looking forecast

- [`get_ncast()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/get_ncast.md)
  : Nowcast right-truncated surveillance data

- [`print(`*`<accidda_cv>`*`)`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/print.accidda_cv.md)
  :

  Print an `accidda_cv` object

- [`print(`*`<accidda_data>`*`)`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/print.accidda_data.md)
  :

  Print an `accidda_data` object

- [`print(`*`<accidda_fcast>`*`)`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/print.accidda_fcast.md)
  :

  Print an `accidda_fcast` object

- [`print(`*`<accidda_ncast>`*`)`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/print.accidda_ncast.md)
  :

  Print an `accidda_ncast` object

- [`to_respilens()`](https://accidda.github.io/acciddasuite/reference/to_respilens.md)
  : Convert a forecast to RespiLens format
